data.name: Hentai Ami
data.detailed_description:
歡迎來到 《Hentai Ami》 的世界，您將在這裡與一位充滿魅力的女主角共度時光。她熱愛健身房的訓練，並對 BDSM 世界充滿熱情。在遊戲中，您將逐步解鎖她的獨特個性，一關接一關地揭示她的各個方面。

遊戲包含 30 個關卡，每個關卡都帶來新的挑戰。您可以選擇以下三個難度級別：

簡單 — 適合新手玩家。

中等 — 挑戰與樂趣的平衡。

困難 — 為不畏艱難的遊戲大師準備。

特色功能：

  • 融合 BDSM 元素的動漫風格氛圍。

  • 30 個關卡。

  • 30 個成就等待解鎖。

  • 畫廊模式。

  • 多種難度選擇。

  • 放鬆且浪漫的背景音樂。

您的目標是解鎖與女主角的所有場景，展現您的解謎技巧，享受一場引人入勝的互動體驗。

data.short_description: 艾米是一位自信而熱愛運動的女孩，她經常去健身房，並對BDSM充滿興趣，在其中找到力量、信任和自我表達之間的平衡。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 繁體中文*, 簡體中文*, 韓文*, 波蘭文*, 俄文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Ami
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of "Hentai Ami", where you'll spend time with a charismatic heroine who adores gym workouts and has a passion for the world of BDSM. As you progress through the game, you'll gradually uncover her unique personality, level by level, revealing every facet of her character.

The game offers 30 levels, each presenting new challenges. You can choose from three difficulty levels:

Easy — perfect for beginners.

Moderate — a balance between challenge and enjoyment.

Hard — for true gaming masters who aren't afraid of difficulties.

Features:

  • Anime-inspired atmosphere with BDSM elements.

  • 30 levels.

  • 30 achievements to unlock.

  • Gallery.

  • Multiple difficulty levels.

  • Relaxing and romantic music.

Your goal is to unlock all scenes with the heroine, prove your puzzle-solving skills, and enjoy an engaging interactive experience.

data.short_description: Ami is a confident, athletic girl who goes to the gym and is passionate about BDSM, finding a balance of strength, trust, and self-expression in it.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, Traditional Chinese*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*, Polish*, Russian*, Turkish*, Ukrainian*, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support
